description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat, multi-level roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, likely concrete or brick, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The front features a covered porch supported by a single column, and a set of three low, rectangular barriers or planters. The rear of the house has a wide wooden deck area, partially sheltered by the roof overhang. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped in pairs and others as single units, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat, multi-level roof, light gray exterior, large windows, and a covered porch with a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, three low rectangular barriers, large windows, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof overhang, a single window, and the wooden deck area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying paired windows, a solid wall section, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch roof supported by a column, the wooden deck, and the side wall with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and grouped pairs
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with a single supporting column, three low rectangular barriers, and large glass doors.
